time_ms,beat_position,notes,placement_type,note_type,confidence,instrument\n0.0,1.0,1000,4,2,0.95,kick\n125.0,1.25,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n250.0,1.5,0010,4,3,0.88,snare\n375.0,1.75,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n500.0,2.0,2000,4,2,1.0,bass\n625.0,2.25,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n750.0,2.5,0100,4,3,0.82,snare\n875.0,2.75,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n1000.0,3.0,3001,4,2,0.91,kick\n1125.0,3.25,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n1250.0,3.5,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n1375.0,3.75,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n1500.0,4.0,0000,0,2,1.0,unknown\n1625.0,4.25,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n1750.0,4.5,0010,4,3,0.79,snare\n1875.0,4.75,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n2000.0,5.0,,-1,-1,1.0,separator\n2322.72,5.41,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n2485.26,5.66,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n2659.41,6.01,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n2984.49,6.27,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n3483.72,6.62,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n3994.56,7.01,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n4157.10,7.23,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n4830.48,7.67,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n5155.56,8.00,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n5364.54,8.31,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n5654.78,8.63,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n5991.47,9.00,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n6258.50,9.31,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n6409.43,9.62,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n6664.85,9.94,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n7001.54,10.31,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n7140.86,10.55,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n7245.35,10.81,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n7303.40,11.12,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n7640.09,11.42,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n7837.46,11.71,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n7953.56,12.00,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n8081.27,12.28,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n8406.35,12.56,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n8499.23,12.83,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n8743.04,13.13,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n8905.58,13.42,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n9056.51,13.69,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n9242.27,13.98,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n9311.93,14.25,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n9880.82,14.52,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n9996.92,14.81,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n10380.05,15.15,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n10832.83,15.44,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n11215.96,15.74,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n11297.23,16.01,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n11633.92,16.36,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n11831.29,16.62,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n11959.00,16.90,0
